user.title: Smarting HOME — Choose License
user.description:
Welcome to Smarting HOME Energy Management!

Choose your license mode:
• **FREE** — All sensors, G13 tariff, RCE prices (basic monitoring)
• **PRO** — Full HEMS engine, AI Advisor, all blueprints & dashboards

Purchase PRO at {website}

license.title: Smarting HOME — License Activation
license.description:
Enter your Smarting HOME PRO license key.
Purchase a license at {website}

tariff.title: Tariff Configuration
tariff.description:
Select your electricity tariff.
G13 prices: Off-peak {g13_off_peak}, Morning {g13_morning}, Afternoon {g13_afternoon}

ai.title: AI Energy Advisor (Optional)
ai.description:
Configure AI providers for intelligent energy optimization.
Leave empty to skip.

error.invalid_license: Invalid license key. Please check your key or purchase at smartinghome.pl
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Smarting HOME license server. Check your internet connection.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

upgrade.title: Smarting HOME — Settings & Upgrade
upgrade.description:
You are on the FREE plan. Enter a PRO license key to unlock all features.
Buy at: {website}
